# Obligatory Java Current Version Update

## Purpose

Keep the project aligned with the current configured Java baseline (Java 21 in this repository) across code, build, tests, and docs.

## Required Actions

1. Set and keep Maven Java properties consistent (`source`, `target`, `release`).
2. Ensure code compiles under the configured version.
3. Keep tests compatible and passing under the same version.
4. Update architecture/docs when Java-version-driven design changes occur.
5. Avoid partial upgrades (code updated but build/docs stale).

## Repository Checks

- `pom.xml` Java version fields are aligned.
- Source and test files compile with configured Java version.
- Documentation does not contradict current build/runtime setup.
